rows.content: This panel displays basic characteristics of your keyboard and
display and allows you alter some of them. This information tells
SPF/PC how you want to handle the display and keyboard.
SPF/PC obtains much of the information it needs from the operating
system. Some entry fields on the panel prompt you for additional
information.  For example, you identify the character you want to
use as a command delimiter when issuing a string of commands.
NUMBER OF PF KEYS+- This field is for display only.  If you have an IBM
Enhanced Keyboard, 48 PF keys are available.  If you have an
AT-style keyboard, 40 PF keys are available.
INPUT FIELD PAD+- This is field is for display only.  It reminds you
that SPF/PC always acts as if the field is null padded. (This is
equivalent to using ISPF/PDF in nulls on mode.)
